SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-09-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-09-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: MARK SCHREIBER. APPEARANC BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-09-2009 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HANDLEY, JOSEPH SANCHEZ $1,731.80 PRINCIPAL, $45.94 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,777.74, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT.
